title: もう1人のお母ちゃんへ

text_block_list.text:
One day, Special Week invites me out to the
beach.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Trainer! This way! I'm over here!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: There's someone I'd like you to meet today!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Hehe, the person in question is...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: My other mom!
choice_data_list: Huh?! What does that even mean?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Well, let me take you back to when I was a little
kid...

text_block_list.name: Young Spe
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... Mom... why are we at the beach?

text_block_list.name: Spe's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Because, dear... you said you wanted to see your
other mother.

text_block_list.name: Young Spe
text_block_list.text: But my other mom... is already...

text_block_list.name: Spe's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Your mother and I would often come here to talk
whenever something was bothering either one of
us...

text_block_list.name: Spe's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Even now, whenever I'm feeling lost, I come here
to talk to her.

text_block_list.name: Young Spe
text_block_list.text: You talk to my other mom?

text_block_list.name: Spe's Mother
text_block_list.text:
That's right. It's true I can't see her, but she's
definitely here. I know it... I can feel it.

text_block_list.name: Spe's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Go on, speak up if you've got something to tell
her. I'm sure she'll hear you.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ever since then, I started coming to the beach
whenever I felt like talking to my other mom.
choice_data_list: What do you have to tell her today?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
It's a little late now, but I remembered I hadn't
introduced you yet.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ideally, I wanted us to be in Hokkaido for this,
but I guess all the seas are connected.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I'm sure she's listening, even from here!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: All righty, here I go!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Mamaaa! This person here is my trainer!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
My trainer's kind, smart, and always supportive of
me and my dreams! So rest assured—I'm in the
best of hands!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Mamaaa! I'm so glad to attend Tracen Academy!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Phew... I finally got to tell her. I wonder if she'll be
happy for me.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah, you should say something to her too,
Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I'm sure she'd like to talk with you!
There's only one thing I need to tell her mother.
choice_data_list:
I'm going to make your daughter the number
one in all of Japan!

I'm going to make your daughter the number
one in all of Japan!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Heh... Hehe. Let's do our best to rise to the top!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Is there anything else you want to tell my other
mom? Something about me, for example?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Like, "She's really giving it her all," or, "Her dance
skills have improved a lot."
choice_data_list: Please make sure she doesn't eat too much.
Please make sure she doesn't injure herself.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: What?! I don't eat that much!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
W-well... I guess I go little bit overboard when the
food's really good...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Mom did tell me that Mama was a light eater.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
So how's it that I ended up with such a big
appetite?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Gasp! What if my overeating is a reaction to Mama's undereating?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: If that's the case, then...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Mamaaa! I'll eat enough for the both of us!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'll eat lots of tasty food so I can stay healthy an'
happy!

Her big voice resounds far across the sea. There's
no doubt her other mother will continue to watch
over her.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
You're making it sound like I'm some klutz who
gets hurt all the time!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: What're you looking away for?! I am not a klutz!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Although I do have my clumsy moments...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Gasp! What if I inherited my clumsiness from Mama?!
Splash!

Suddenly, a large wave comes crashing down on
Special Week.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Eep!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh no... Mamaaa! I'm sooo sorry!

Her loud apology resounds far across the sea. It
might be a coincidence—or perhaps it's my
imagination at play—but the waves seem a little
calmer now.
